voice_notes.raw_asr_simulation: Ramaiah gari ki molli noppi undi, I be proven adugutunnaru, stent valla ivvaledu, parasitamol continue cheyandi, trauma doll try cheddham, dizziness monitor cheyali

voice_notes.plain_english: Patient Ramaiah has knee pain, requesting Ibuprofen, but due to stent DO NOT GIVE Ibuprofen, continue Paracetamol, try Tramadol, monitor for dizziness

expected_nodes.title: DO NOT give Ibuprofen — cardiac stent contraindication
Initiate Tramadol — trial for pain management
Patient on cardiac stent — NSAIDs contraindicated

voice_notes.chatgpt_raw_simulation: Patient Ramaiah has nappy rash. Try trauma doll. Parasitamol continue. Dizziness monitor.
voice_notes.why_dangerous: Flipped critical negation: 'ivvaledu Ibuprofen' (DO NOT give) became 'try Ibuprofen' — cardiac stent patient receiving NSAID could cause stent thrombosis

expected_nodes.title: DO NOT give Metformin — renal impairment
DO NOT give Ibuprofen — renal compromise
Start Insulin Glargine for glycaemic control

voice_notes.chatgpt_raw_simulation: Metformin for patient. Ibuprofen also to be given. Kidney function check. Glucose monitor twice. Insuline start.
voice_notes.why_dangerous: Both negations flipped — Metformin in CKD causes fatal lactic acidosis. Ibuprofen in CKD causes acute kidney injury.

Start Pregabalin 3 tablets TDS for neuropathic pain

voice_notes.why_dangerous: NSAIDs pre-surgery increase bleeding risk. 'Preg able in' not recognised as Pregabalin — critical pain management missed.

Patient on Clonazepam for seizure management

voice_notes.why_dangerous: Carbamazepine induces Clonazepam metabolism — concurrent use lowers Clonazepam levels, triggers seizure breakthrough.
